requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Uganda does not yet have a single public EV charging connector rule confirmed from official sources, but its import and project evidence should be prepared around the international IEC direction where buyers, fleets, utilities, or site owners specify interoperable charging. For passenger-car AC charging this commonly means IEC 62196-2 Type 2; for DC fast charging it commonly means CCS2, defined under IEC 62196-3. The two/three-wheeler segment may use smaller chargers, battery swapping, or proprietary fleet systems, so connector claims should be limited to the project scope and not overstated as a universal Uganda rule.
summary.zh: 目前未能从官方来源确认乌干达已有单一公共电动汽车充电接口规则；但当采购方、车队、电力公司或场地方要求互操作充电时，进口和项目证据应按IEC国际方向准备。乘用车交流充电通常对应IEC 62196-2 Type 2；直流快充通常对应IEC 62196-3下的CCS2。两/三轮车领域可能采用小型充电器、换电或专有车队系统，因此接口表述应限于具体项目范围，不应夸大为乌干达全国统一规则。
summary.zht: 目前未能從官方來源確認烏干達已有單一公共電動汽車充電接口規則；但當採購方、車隊、電力公司或場地方要求互操作充電時，進口和項目證據應按IEC國際方向準備。乘用車交流充電通常對應IEC 62196-2 Type 2；直流快充通常對應IEC 62196-3下的CCS2。兩/三輪車領域可能採用小型充電器、換電或專有車隊系統，因此接口表述應限於具體項目範圍，不應誇大為烏干達全國統一規則。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC couplers differ from IEC 62196 Type 2 in connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangement, and GB/T DC couplers are geometrically and electrically different from CCS2. China DC charging also commonly uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the communication stack used for CCS2 deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性别、信号和触点排列上不同；GB/T直流耦合器与CCS2在几何和电气层面不同。中国直流充电还通常采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS2部署所用通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性別、信號和觸點排列上不同；GB/T直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何和電氣層面不同。中國直流充電還通常採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS2部署所用通訊棧。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Uganda projects. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity and control pilot circuits, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, and DC communication where CCS2 is required. Adapters should not be presented as a substitute for project-compliant connector design. For two/three-wheelers, confirm whether the buyer requires IEC connectors, a dedicated low-power charger, or a battery-swap interface.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于乌干达IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2项目。转换需要重新设计耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引电路、标签、温升证据、备件，以及在要求CCS2时的直流通信。转接器不应作为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。两/三轮车项目应确认采购方要求IEC接口、专用小功率充电器还是换电接口。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於烏干達IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2項目。轉換需要重新設計耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引電路、標籤、溫升證據、備件，以及在要求CCS2時的直流通訊。轉接器不應作為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。兩/三輪車項目應確認採購方要求IEC接口、專用小功率充電器還是換電接口。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by buyer, fleet, utility, tender, or site specification; GB/T physical incompatibility requires hardware change
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Confirm whether the Uganda project requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping. GB/T connectors cannot be treated as physically compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。在报价、贴标或发货前，应确认乌干达项目是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口不能被视为物理兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認烏干達項目是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口不能被視為物理兼容。
